verified_user Security Standards

Your privacy is our priority

We believe your conversations belong to you. Cuqter is built from the ground up with advanced encryption protocols to ensure that every message, call, and file stays between you and the recipient.

End-to-End Encryption

Cuqter uses the Signal Protocol for all messaging. This means your messages are encrypted before they even leave your device, and can only be decrypted by the intended recipient. Not even Cuqter can read them.

lock
key
shield
AES-256 Multi-Layer Protection
timer

Disappearing Messages

Control your digital footprint. Set messages to disappear automatically after they've been seen, with customizable timers from 5 seconds to one week.

fingerprint

App Lock

Add an extra layer of protection using biometric authentication (FaceID or TouchID) to open the app.

person_off

Privacy Controls

Choose who can see your online status, profile photo, and last seen activity. Complete control over your presence.

cloud_off

Zero Knowledge

We don't store your contacts, call logs, or metadata. Your data is your business, and we want to keep it that way.

Our Data Commitment

Transparent and uncompromising security for your everyday communication.

01

Encryption by Default

Encryption isn't a setting you have to turn on. It's the core foundation of Cuqter. Every message sent, every file shared, and every call made is encrypted by default.

02

Open Source Audits

We believe in security through transparency. Our encryption libraries are open-source and regularly audited by world-renowned security firms to ensure no vulnerabilities exist.

03

Independent Infrastructure

Cuqter operates its own decentralized nodes to prevent central points of failure or data interception. Your routing is as secure as your messages.

Start communicating with peace of mind.

Cuqter

Premium encrypted messaging for the modern era.
